Field.Label: Enable Debug Logging
Field.Description: Enable detailed debug logging for troubleshooting

Field.Label: Device Discovery Timeout (seconds):
Field.Description: How long to wait for device discovery responses

Field.Label: Connection Timeout (seconds):
Field.Description: Timeout for HTTP requests to Konnected devices

Field.Label: Auto-Discovery on Startup
Field.Description: Automatically discover devices when plugin starts

Field.Label: Retry Failed Connections
Field.Description: Automatically retry when device connections fail
